name: dm-display
description: Notify dm-server that a stored artifact should be displayed in the current run UI.

ports.name: path
ports.description: Path emitted by a storage-family node.

label.description: Display label shown in the UI.

render.description: Render mode: auto, text, image, audio, video, json, markdown.

tail.description: Whether text-like files should be tailed.

max_lines.description: Maximum lines returned for tailed text displays.

source.description: Static source file relative to runs/:id/out/.

poll_interval.description: Polling interval in milliseconds for static sources.
